name: Avocado Vegetable Medley
recipeInstructions:
1. In a large bowl, combine the crumbled bacon, chopped eggs, celery slices, chopped onion, and chopped tomatoes.
2. Add enough creamy French dressing to moisten all ingredients.
3. Chill the mixture in the refrigerator for about 30 minutes to allow flavors to meld.
4. Spoon the chilled mixture into individual avocado halves.
5. Serve with additional creamy French dressing on the side.
